ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "sid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "grade_id" TEXT /* Grade level of the student */,
  "section_id" TEXT /* Section the student belongs to */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Class assigned to the student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the institution */,
  "parent_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the student's parent or guardian */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "sid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student (foreign key) */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Semester in which the data is recorded (foreign key) */,
  "raised_hands" INTEGER /* Number of times the student raised hands in class */,
  "visited_resources" INTEGER /* Number of resources the student visited */,
  "announcements_view" INTEGER /* Number of announcements viewed by the student */,
  "discussion" INTEGER /* Number of discussions participated in by the student */,
  "student_absence_days" TEXT /* Categorization of student absence days (e.g., Above-7, Under-7) */,
  "test_scores" INTEGER /* Average test scores for the student in the semester */,
  "project_scores" INTEGER /* Average project scores for the student in the semester */,
  "homework_scores" INTEGER /* Average homework scores for the student in the semester */,
  "attendance_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of classes attended by the student */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Final grade for the semester (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Instructor's feedback on the student's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sid", "semester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject taught in the class */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher assigned to the class (foreign key to teachers table) */,
  "class_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students the class can accommodate */,
  "class_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule of the class (e.g., MWF 9:00-10:15) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sections" (
  "section_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "section_name" TEXT /* Name of the section (e.g., A, B) */,
  "grade_id" TEXT /* Grade level associated with the section */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number where the section is held */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students the section can accommodate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "semesters" (
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each semester */,
  "semester_name" TEXT /* Name of the semester (e.g., F for Fall, S for Spring) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the semester occurs */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the semester */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the semester */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("semester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the teacher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the teacher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the teacher */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the teacher */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the teacher */,
  "hiring_date" TEXT /* Date when the teacher was hired */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the teacher belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id")
)
